_note: Persistent per-bundle kill switch. UNLIKE a bundle's own `disabled` flag, this list SURVIVES the nightly retrain (the trainer never writes this file). Honored before the quality gate. Key = bundle stem {MINI}_{SESSION}_{REGIME}_{direction}. To re-enable a bundle, remove its key. Hot-reloaded every 10s — no restart needed.

disabled.GC_RTH_TREND_UP_long: Disabled 2026-05-30 from 3yr backtest: 1068 trades (21% of ALL trades) @ 38.9% WR, PF 1.06, avg +$12/trade — near-zero edge churning commission, contributing only 2% of total profit. Disabling lifts portfolio PF 1.80->2.16 and WR 50.4%->53.5% while giving up just $12k of $538k. Its stored training WR was inflated (overfit on the train window) so the WR quality gate never caught it. Reversible.
